title: pi-minimal-ui extension settings
description: Schema for the `extensionSettings["pi-minimal-ui"]` block of Pi's settings.json (~/.pi/agent/settings.json globally, .pi/settings.json per-project). Project values override global values; thinking-level overrides merge.

colors.description: Override the Pi accent ("pi") and per-thinking-level colors used by the statusline header gradient and the working spinner.

pi.description: Base accent color. Replaces the theme's `accent` everywhere this extension paints (header `pi` prefix, edge `///`, diagonal rule, current-path text, gradient start, spinner solid/start).

thinking.description: Per-thinking-level colors. Each key replaces the corresponding `thinking*` theme color (used for the model-info label and the gradient end). Unset levels keep the theme default.

hexColor.description: CSS-style hex color (`#RGB` or `#RRGGBB`, with or without leading `#`).
